title: Contact - Perran Moon MP
meta_description: If you are resident in the Camborne, Redruth and Hayle constituency, please use these links to contact Perran Moon MP.
headings: h3: Please use one of the methods listed below
h2: Perran is here to help everyone
h3: What if Perran isn't your MP?
text_excerpt: Contact - Perran Moon MP Skip to main content Hit enter to search or ESC to close Close Search Menu Menu Contact me Please use one of the methods listed below Perran is here to help everyone Perran welcomes contact from all his constituents. There are a number of ways to get in touch. Email Perran Perran's Instagram Perran on Facebook Call Perran's Constituency Office: 01209206046 Notes for contacting Perran Timeframes for a reply Due to the large number of emails, letters and phone calls each day, I will try and respond to you as quickly as possible. Please note that all communications, including emails, are dealt with in the order in which they are received. We currently have a significant volume of casework coming in, and whilst we generally aim to get back within two weeks, at present it will take significantly longer. Have you included your full home address? If not please re-send your email including this information in order to receive a response. This is requested even if you email frequently. What if Perran isn't your MP? Parliamentary Protocol prevents an MP from dealing with enquiries form another MP’s constituency, so be sure that you are a constituent of Camborne and Redruth, as contacting the wrong representative can cause delays to your case. You can check online here: FindYourMP If your query relates to a Local Authority issue then please direct your correspondence directly to your locally elected Cornwall Councillor. To find your local representative please visit: MyLocalCouncillor © 2026 Perran Moon MP Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy facebook instagram phone email Close Menu Home About Me News Policies Constituency Activity Parliamentary Activity FAQs Gallery Contact facebook instagram phone email
